mapper.update: update t_shipper_contact set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where contact_id = #{contactId}

update t_shipper_contact set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where shipper_id in
#{item}
update t_shipper_contact set default_flag = #{defaultFlag} where contact_id = #{contactId}
mapper.select: select * from t_shipper_contact where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
select * from t_shipper_contact where default_flag = #{defaultFlag} and shipper_id = #{shipperId}
